since_last: 43% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.29%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -1.41% · Gold -0.48% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 43% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.29%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.29%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.89%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -5.42%
cards.body: Leaders: PWR +3.56%, NOW +2.66%, SAP +2.11%, DDOG +2.08%, CRWD +1.74%. Laggards: MU -5.42%, ZBRA -5.23%, AMAT -4.85%, LRCX -4.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.60% at $157.85
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
